# Context7 Query Prompts

Use these query shapes to refresh the source context before answering Livewire 4 Components questions. Always keep the query scoped to `/websites/livewire_laravel_4_x`.

## Component Creation And Rendering
```text
Livewire 4 component fundamentals documentation: make:livewire command, single-file components, multi-file components, class-based components, command options, livewire:convert, rendering with <livewire:...>, namespaced components, passing props, mount parameters, route parameters, route model binding, component namespaces, component locations, stubs, troubleshooting. Return documented APIs, commands, flags, paths, examples, and caveats only.
```

## State And Properties
```text
Livewire 4 properties documentation: public properties, protected properties, mount initialization, fill, reset, pull, wire:model modifiers, supported property types, Wireable custom types, JavaScript $wire property access, $wire.set, #[Url], #[Locked], Eloquent model locking, property security, Eloquent constraint limitations. Return documented attributes, method signatures, examples, and caveats only.
```

## Actions And Lifecycle
```text
Livewire 4 actions and lifecycle hooks documentation: wire:click, wire:submit, action parameters, model binding, dependency injection, event listener modifiers, $refresh, wire:confirm, Alpine $wire actions, JavaScript actions, magic actions, #[Renderless], skipRender, .renderless, #[Async], .async, preserve-scroll, public method security, mount, boot, updating, updated, hydrate, dehydrate, rendering, rendered, exception, trait hooks, form object hooks. Return documented APIs and caveats only.
```
